MINI MINUTES: Appearaces: Ronald Berestka, Esq. of Stone Associates, (925-938-1555 x11), for William Lord, Defendant and moving party / Kristen Ross, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, (415-835-6777), for Eric Brown, Plaintiff and opposing party / Brenda L. Crow, Court Reporter, CSR#10503, (916-572-7488)

ARGUED - Defendant Lord's Motion for Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication is taken under submission. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules now as follows: Defendant Lord's Motion for Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication is DENIED. See order for details. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter: Brenda L. Crow, #10503), (D501)
